svg.text: AI-Powered Marketing Budget Allocation Agent — Component Map
Numbered badges = the five required components (Section 6.1) · arrows = execution order (Section 6.2)
Model A / B / C comparison on
Conversational Agent — cross-cutting chat layer (all UI pages)
Graceful degradation: no API key → deterministic template output; full functionality and the test suite run key-free (Claude & Gemini)
Runtime overrides (κ, u_c, B) re-evaluate the entire chain consistently
Validation: pytest tests/ — 197 passed, 2 skipped integration stubs — runs without any API key

Coverage: data pipeline · weekly stats · archive handling · backward analysis · guardrails (every rule: block / redirect / pass-through / redaction) · MMM · optimizer · baseline · BO tuning · explainer
